data.name: Frankie's FunClub
data.detailed_description:
Enter into the long-since defunct Frankie's Funclub! Where parties used to fill the air with laughter and activity - now, it lies abandoned, and has fallen prey to scavengers, like you! Sneak around in this thrilling thief-simulator finding valuable (and sometimes suspicious) LOOT.

Resell on the black market for PROFIT, upgrades, and secret unlockable content. You're not alone, however, and certain threats hang around every corner, hungry for attention!

  • Avoid detection from the wandering residents and security cameras of the FunClub by sneaking, hiding from, and distracting them!

  • Collect valuable merchandise from the Club's glory days to earn a profit

  • Snag photos of the girls to sell online from your own furnishable hideout!

  • Disguise yourself and walk among the girls to succeed!

  • In-game achievements for thieves who explore every inch of the FunClub

  • Over a dozen scenes to snatch up!

  • 10+ findable looping VHS tapes~

Welcome to Frankie's FunClub!

Welcome to Frankie's FunClub!
data.short_description: Frankie's FunClub toes the line between horror and NSFW as you navigate the abandoned FunClub and avoid threats from the girls left behind there. Sneak, loot, and FUCK your way to a better life with copious scenes and loops available for you to find and unlock for a thrill!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any Windows 64-bit installation
  • 處理器: Intel i3-9000
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: A vulkan-compatible device
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 64-Bit
  • 處理器: Intel i5-12000
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia RTX 3050
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Any Windows 64-bit installation
  • Processor: Intel i3-9000
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: A vulkan-compatible device
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
